description: Recherche sur les aspects légaux, normes et propriété intellectuelle

userStories.title: Certifications obligatoires
userStories.notes: CE marking (EUR 1,300-21,900), FCC (USD 5,400-12,000), RED cybersecurity deadline August 2025, SAR testing required for wearables. FDA wellness vs medical device distinction clarified January 2026.

userStories.title: Propriété intellectuelle
userStories.notes: Budget Year 1: EUR 18,500-53,000. Priorité: brevets utility (mécanique, UI, AI), trademarks EU+USA, design registration EUIPO. Patent gold rush en cours dans le secteur wearables.

userStories.title: RGPD et données
userStories.notes: Health/biometric data = special category (Art. 9). Explicit consent required. DPIA mandatory. Documentation: Privacy Policy, Art.30 Register, DPIA, Processor Agreements. Cost: EUR 10,000-28,000.

userStories.title: Réglementation wearables
userStories.notes: EU AI Act: high-risk if health claims (effective Aug 2027). RED cybersecurity EN 18031 mandatory Aug 2025. UN 38.3 battery testing required (EUR 3,000-8,000). Cyber Resilience Act 2027.

userStories.title: Structure juridique
userStories.description: Définir la structure légale de l'entreprise
userStories.notes: SAS recommended (flexible, investor-friendly). SASU for solo founder. France jurisdiction for EU access + R&D tax credits. Required docs: Shareholders Agreement, IP Assignment, Vesting Schedule.

criticalDates: August 2027: EU AI Act for regulated products
keyRisks: Medical device classification if health claims
